response.justification: Bogdan has extensive experience in software development, including backend, frontend, and embedded systems, but his background lacks direct experience with SoC/IP modeling, AI accelerator hardware optimization, deep-learning workload analysis, or hardware-software co-design. His expertise in web/mobile development and general software engineering does not align closely with the core technical requirements of the Principal Performance Architect role, which heavily emphasizes hardware optimization, AI accelerator architectures, and performance bottlenecks in deep-learning workloads.
strengths: Strong software engineering background with expertise in multiple languages and frameworks
Proven ability to build and optimize scalable systems (e.g., low-latency apps, AI-agent infrastructure)
Experience with performance optimization in web and embedded contexts
concerns: No demonstrated experience with SoC/IP modeling or AI accelerator hardware optimization
Lacks direct experience with deep-learning workload analysis or GPU architecture
Background is heavily software-focused rather than hardware/performance architecture for AI accelerators

key_factors.factor: System architecture and AI accelerator design
